question: Will Nickel price on the London Metal Exchange exceed 8500 USD/tonne on May 31, 2026?
textDescription:
This market tracks Nickel price on the London Metal Exchange.

Measurement date: May 31, 2026

Resolution:

YES if: Nickel price on the London Metal Exchange ≥ 8500 USD/tonne on 2026-05-31

NO if: Nickel price on the London Metal Exchange < 8500 USD/tonne on 2026-05-31

LME data feed, Metal Bulletin reports

The Indonesian mining quota cut impacts global supplies, with price increases in stainless steel reflecting tightening market conditions.

Rationale: The significant cut at Indonesia’s biggest nickel operation may push up prices due to reduced supply, prompting stainless producers to raise their prices.

Source: Article
newsShortReason: Nickel prices have been consistently above $18,500 per tonne, indicating a low likelihood of dropping below $8,500 by May 31, 2026.
newsKeyEvidence: As of May 22, 2026, the LME 3-month nickel price was $18,880 per tonne. ([tacto.ai](https://www.tacto.ai/en-us/commodities/nickel-price?utm_source=openai)) | Goldman Sachs raised its 2026 average nickel price forecast to $18,500 per tonne, citing tighter Indonesian supply.
